summary: This video is educational/documentary content about the UAB Surgery Minimally Invasive Surgery Fellowship program. It contains institutional introductions, program director interviews (Richard Stahl, MD), facility tours, surgical team footage, and clinical/imaging content. No FLS task performance or expert demonstration is present.
rationale: Video classification as 'instructional' — contains narration, interviews, institutional branding, and documentary-style editing. No isolated FLS task box, trainer, or dedicated task performance visible. Content focuses on fellowship program marketing and clinical context rather than FLS task execution.

verbal_cues: UAB Surgery Minimally Invasive Surgery Fellowship program overview
Program director Richard Stahl discussing fellowship

cannot_score_reasons: No FLS task box or trainer visible
Content is institutional/fellowship program overview, not skill assessment
